channel.title: Startup on Joe Berusch
channel.description: Recent content in Startup on Joe Berusch

item.title: Fuse
item.description: A social media app I built as part of a 3-person dev team in the Summer after my 1st year. The project was part of the Accelerator at the Polsky Center for Entrepreneurship and Innovation. languages used: React Native (Frontend) Redux (Frontend) Ruby on Rails (Backend) tools used: Trello Git/Github Testflight (iOS beta testing) More info on the platform itself here
